title: Gantt View in Portfolios - Option to Remove Board Name Label
excerpt: When you have a portfolio connected to multiple boards and choose to label the timeline view by “Name”, it automatically includes the item name AND the name of the connected board (regardless of how you choose to group t…

posts.author: DanielleC (Danielle Caporale)
posts.cookedHtml: When you have a portfolio connected to multiple boards and choose to label the timeline view by “Name”, it automatically includes the item name AND the name of the connected board (regardless of how you choose to group the items). This makes the labels long and wordy and would be improved if the option to add the board name was in fact optional.

posts.author: hhohn (Henry Hohn)
posts.cookedHtml:
+1

I would like to be able to remove the board name too. As Danielle stated, the label is too wordy and long. Thanks!

posts.author: lmccloskey (Lindsey)
posts.cookedHtml: +1 - is this a feature yet? The label is too lengthy, and I would just prefer the item name with the board name removed.
